infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Meropaw needs access to your photo library to add photos of your pets.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Meropaw needs camera access to take photos of your pets.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Meropaw needs permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Meropaw uses your location to find nearby vet clinics when you schedule a visit.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Meropaw adds your vet appointments to your calendar so you don't miss them.

plugins.calendarPermission: Meropaw adds your vet appointments to your calendar so you don't miss them.

plugins.photosPermission: Meropaw needs access to your photo library to add photos of your pets.
plugins.cameraPermission: Meropaw needs camera access to take photos of your pets.
